creator: me@svmhdvn.name
text:
> but was surprised neither the ports infrastructure nor portlint warned about this.

Portlint now warns about options without a description. See the following:

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/ports-mgmt/portlint/src/portlint.pl?id=de45de2513b9c2e67a3470e69b0a9f771405b565#n1644

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/ports-mgmt/portlint/src/portlint.pl?id=de45de2513b9c2e67a3470e69b0a9f771405b565#n1767

I think this bug can be closed now.
